creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Kevin Thank you for your submission(s).

Should the changes in this issue be committed atomically (in a single commit) with bug 221019 and bug 221018 or can they be independently committed?

If so, please:

- Update the patch here (it is the 'primary' port) to include those changes
- Obsolete the patches in the other issues
- Add maintainers for the other ports (if they are different to maintainer-feedback ? <email> flags in this issue
- Add bug 221018 and bug 221019 to the 'Blocks' field in this issue and remove them from See Also (which im adding now)
